# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-03-24 | **更新时间**: 06:56 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[00:00]` **OverT Bio 宣布成立临床顾问委员会，支持 OVT-101 在卵巢癌和其他实体瘤中的临床开发**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *OverT Bio Announces the Formation of the Clinical Advisory Board to Support the Clinical Development of OVT-101 in Ovarian Cancer and Other Solid Tumors* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **🏛️监管 | 住友制药美国公司宣布其在研疗法 DSP-3077 已获得 FDA 治疗色素性视网膜炎的孤儿药资格认定**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Sumitomo Pharma America Announces that its Investigational Therapy DSP-3077 Has Received FDA Orphan Drug Designation for the Treatment of Retinitis Pigmentosa* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:45]` **Craig Tendler 医学博士、JNJ 前肿瘤学临床开发全球主管将领导 TuHURA Bioscience 的 AML 和其他血液相关癌症的 VISTA 项目**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Craig Tendler, M.D., JNJ's Former Global Head of Oncology Clinical Development, to Lead TuHURA Bioscience's VISTA Program in AML and other Blood Related Cancers* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[05:30]` **斥资2.4亿！A股药企押注双靶点CAR-T** [🔗阅读原文](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTE9XcVVkamNZSU9GWmhZOUpiajVRRm9EeUxqME56aDZFYUszam1hUTNZbVhfM015M3ZBejZpS1Q5X3haWGNlQXQ5UmVfZlppYjZtbEdWMHdIdzRfN2cxaEpXTy1tMWI3QmVxWENMSVktaXNWM3BON3FETEJ3?oc=5)
- `[20:53]` **Tempest 的生命线被稀释：所有赌注都押在近期 CAR-T 催化剂的执行上**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Tempest's Diluted Lifeline: All Bets on Near-Term CAR-T Catalyst Execution* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5DTDROcXBSbXFLWmx6Z0pXZjJveERyV2NOX04yVEM4SjJyUkxfME10bnR2T2U5ODZveEpJeG43eHlHWks4R1I1aUZVS3ZnS1FIa2k3RDdnY3FfMjUtbFR1WlZfONIBY0FVX3lxTE5DTDROcXBSbXFLWmx6Z0pXZjJveERyV2NOX04yVEM4SjJyUkxfME10bnR2T2U5ODZveEpJeG43eHlHWks4R1I1aUZVS3ZnS1FIa2k3RDdnY3FfMjUtbFR1WlZfOA?oc=5)</small>
- `[13:17]` **🏛️监管 | ImmunityBio 宣布 ANKTIVA® 在中国澳门特别行政区获批用于治疗卡介苗无反应的 CIS ± 乳头状肿瘤 NMIBC**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *ImmunityBio Announces Approval in Macau SAR, China for ANKTIVA® in BCG-Unresponsive NMIBC with CIS ± Papillary Tumors* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
